market_summary: US equities are set up for a relief-driven open after President Trump paused immediate Iran strike action for five days and crude pulled back sharply, improving the tape for travel and consumer-sensitive names. SPY was indicated near 576.29 in premarket pricing while volatility remained elevated, with VIX futures around 26.76, so the bias is risk-on but selective rather than fully aggressive.

CCL.execution_condition: Only buy if CCL holds above 24.40 after the open while crude remains weak and the stock can sustain trade through the 24.80 to 25.00 area on above-average volume.
CCL.reasoning: The strongest near-term macro tailwind this morning is lower oil following the Iran de-escalation headline, and cruise operators are direct beneficiaries of that fuel-cost relief. CCL also has an earnings catalyst later this week, so it has both a same-day macro driver and a near-term event to keep attention on the name.
catalysts: Oil selloff after Trump paused Iran strike action for five days
Cruise stocks highlighted as premarket beneficiaries of lower fuel costs
Carnival earnings due later this week
risks: Any reversal higher in crude could quickly unwind the travel bid
A weak market open could turn this into a gap-and-fade setup
Event risk rises as the stock approaches earnings

supporting_articles.title: Why Are Cruise Stocks Soaring Monday? Carnival, Norwegian Cruise And Royal Caribbean Gain As Oil Prices Slip
supporting_articles.reason: Directly ties CCL strength to the morning oil move and names cruise lines as beneficiaries.

supporting_articles.title: Trump's 5-Day Iran Pause Crashes Oil Prices – Is TACO Trade Back?
supporting_articles.reason: Explains the macro catalyst behind the lower-oil, higher-travel-risk setup.

RCL.execution_condition: Only upgrade this to an entry if RCL consolidates above 263.00 after the open and cruise peers keep outperforming while crude stays under pressure.
RCL.reasoning: RCL shares the same fuel-cost and risk-on travel catalyst as CCL, but the stock is already stronger and more extended in absolute price terms. That makes it attractive only on confirmation rather than as an immediate chase at the open.
catalysts: Cruise group strength tied to softer oil
Macro relief rally in consumer-discretionary travel names
risks: Extended price action increases gap-and-fade risk
Higher-beta travel names can reverse hard if headlines change
No near-term earnings timing advantage versus CCL for today's setup

supporting_articles.title: Why Are Cruise Stocks Soaring Monday? Carnival, Norwegian Cruise And Royal Caribbean Gain As Oil Prices Slip
supporting_articles.reason: Names RCL specifically as part of the premarket cruise move.

KBH.execution_condition: Only buy if KBH is holding 51.00 or better after the first 30 minutes and homebuilders are not lagging the broader risk-on tape.
KBH.reasoning: KB Home reports after the close on March 24, which puts the stock into the short list of liquid event names likely to attract positioning ahead of earnings. In a relief-driven tape, beaten-down cyclical names often catch a bid before the actual report if the market stays constructive.
catalysts: Earnings scheduled after the close on March 24, 2026
Risk-on market regime favors cyclical beta ahead of events
risks: Homebuilders can underperform if rates reprice higher intraday
Pre-earnings setups are vulnerable to profit-taking late in the session
Noisy housing macro data can cap upside

supporting_articles.title: Stock Market Today: Stocks Edge Lower as Investors Weigh Mideast Risks; These 20-Plus Names Are Reporting Earnings This Week
supporting_articles.reason: Confirms KBH is one of the notable earnings names reporting this week, with the report due after the close on March 24.

BRZE.execution_condition: Only act if BRZE reclaims 18.60 and holds the move through midday while software stays firm relative to the S&P 500.
BRZE.reasoning: Braze reports after the close on March 24, giving it a clean, time-defined catalyst. The setup is interesting because software can participate in a risk-on relief session, but the event is close enough that I want confirmation instead of a blind pre-earnings entry.
catalysts: Earnings scheduled after the close on March 24, 2026
Potential software participation in a relief rally
risks: Smaller-cap software can be ill-behaved around earnings
A weak Nasdaq tape would undercut the long thesis quickly
Event risk is close enough to punish poor entry timing

supporting_articles.title: Stock Market Today: Stocks Edge Lower as Investors Weigh Mideast Risks; These 20-Plus Names Are Reporting Earnings This Week
supporting_articles.reason: Flags BRZE as a scheduled earnings name for March 24, which is the core catalyst for today's watch status.

AIR.execution_condition: Only consider AIR if it stays above 101.50 and volume expands into the midday session ahead of tomorrow's earnings report.
AIR.reasoning: AAR is a liquid-enough event name with earnings due before the open on March 24. The setup can work in a constructive tape, but it is less directly tied to today's macro relief theme than cruise or homebuilder exposure, so it belongs on watch rather than in the active buy list.
catalysts: Earnings scheduled before the open on March 24, 2026
Broader risk-on session could lift industrial event names
risks: Industrial names can lose momentum quickly if the market broadens away from them

supporting_articles.title: Stock Market Today: Stocks Edge Lower as Investors Weigh Mideast Risks; These 20-Plus Names Are Reporting Earnings This Week
supporting_articles.reason: Lists AIR as a notable earnings report due before the open on March 24.

NVDA.execution_condition: Only consider a trade if NVDA stays above 172.00 and retakes the 174.00 area with semiconductors confirming higher after the opening volatility settles.
NVDA.reasoning: NVDA still has leadership status in a risk-on market and opened the day with an additional AI ecosystem headline after Uber expanded its tie-up using Nvidia's AV technology. Even so, the stock is not the cleanest expression of today's crude-driven macro theme, so it remains a conditional watch rather than an automatic buy.
catalysts: Uber expanded partnership using Nvidia AV technology
Bullish options-flow commentary around the stock into the open
Semiconductor participation in any broad relief rally
risks: If semiconductors lag, NVDA can become a source of index drag
The stock is crowded and prone to sharp intraday reversals
The AI headline is incremental rather than transformative

supporting_articles.title: Oil prices resume rise and stocks mostly fall after Trump cuts short G7 visit and warns Tehran
supporting_articles.reason: Includes the Nvidia-related Uber partnership headline and frames it within the broader market backdrop.

supporting_articles.title: PREMARKET NEWS REPORT March 23, 2026
supporting_articles.reason: Adds same-day options-flow context showing ongoing speculative interest in NVDA.
